reviews.review_description: it would not let me play

developer_response.body:
We're sorry for the inconvenience and for not being able to provide a smooth experience.

Please check that a Room Scale space has been set up on your headset, as the game requires it to run properly.

If you're still experiencing issues, please contact us at [immersedplayer@gmail.com] with more information about the situation. We'll do our best to assist you and resolve the problem as soon as possible.

reviews.review_description:
hi i just brought the  new add on  set called  frumi land , but its not showing up in the game items  section. Ime just wondering how i find the new items....




I've been playing it for 4 hours  tonight, haha   you can spend time on it and not realise how long ,you get carried away  haha  building and decorating ure little spaces .the only thing I can't find is instructions of what to do so I started by making my own little  space up with what items there is to play with but now ime not sure what to do next,  and there's no instructions to explain , but this game could be made huge adding so much stuff to it there's no end of items and themes that could be added  its endless.  I love games like this where you can make  ure own environment or space the game though  is brillian t  idea ,please  add lots more to this and it will be brilliant

developer_response.body:
First of all, thank you very much for enjoying Little Nook.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience of not seeing the purchased theme in your item list, even after buying a new theme to access more items. We are currently working hard to resolve this issue and will do our best to fix it as soon as possible.

Thank you for your patience and support.

------

This issue has now been resolved with a recent update. We sincerely apologize again for the inconvenience this may have caused, and we truly appreciate your patience while we worked on fixing it.

reviews.review_description: Excellent. Profound. Superior. Premium. Dom Perignon Champagne grade. Luxurious. Elegant. Opulent. Spectacular. Engineering marvel. Beautiful. Purrs on all 12 cylinders.

developer_response.body:
Amazing. Creative. Inspiring. Cozy. Charming. Relaxing. Delightful.
Thank you so much for enjoying Little Nook and sharing your kind words.
We’ll keep working to bring you even more fun and exciting content! ✨

reviews.review_title: A relaxing game with amazing details!
reviews.review_description: I completely lost track of time playing this. The tiny items are so intricate and adorable that just looking at them makes me happy. Watching the little frumis wander around the cozy room I decorated is so relaxing. It's a great game to just unwind and clear my head without having to think too much.

This game is so adorable. I was able to unlock everything fairly quickly and bought the Christmas set. I'd love to see more added sets to make each world more in depth and even more added new sets. Maybe make the little character more expressive and add like ladders or steps so you can connect the blocked sections so they can move around more.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for enjoying Little Nook!

We are always thinking about how to create more eye-catching items and themes.
We truly appreciate your ideas as well—such as giving Frumis more expressive emotions and adding functional elements like ladders or steps that they can actually use.

Thanks again for your support! ✨

reviews.review_description: So, i played it. Then when i pressed start or im ready it glitched. ?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for letting us know, and we’re sorry for the inconvenience.

If the game stops or glitches when pressing the Start button, please check room space permission or reinstalling it.
If the issue persists or you’d like to report more details, please contact us at [immersedplayer@gmail.com]

Thanks again for your support! ✨

reviews.review_description:
Firstly, Little'Mons is lovingly crafted. The attention to detail in the tiny Models is adorable. The mini cheeseburgers, croissants, the vending machines with tiny individually modeled items inside, books on a shelf that actually have a hardcover on them etc. Very impressed with all the "Little" details ;) The game itself is very chill and relaxing. You choose a board, place items to fill out your room. Have Fruit Monsters interact in that little room, Complete Quests to unlock more Fruit Monsters (10 Total) and Theme Sets. My fav being the Library Sets. I fully unlocked everything and can relax and create the perfect room before I unleash the Fruit Monsters upon it 😆
Hopefully there will be some updates in the future with more Fruit Monsters and Theme Sets.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for enjoying the world of LittleMon!
The updates you mentioned are already in our plans, and we’re excited to add even more of the cute models that you enjoyed.
We hope you continue to have a wonderful time with your adorable Fruit Monsters! 🍓🍊🍇
